steps.title: Find the antecedent's number
steps.content: The key signal is that the pronoun must refer to the singular noun phrase “a social media post was created.” This tells us what number the possessive pronoun must be.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content:
A possessive pronoun must match its antecedent in number; its is the singular possessive form required. Their is plural, and they're/it's are contractions (meaning “they are” and “it is”) that cannot serve as possessives modifying a noun.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
